papers.title: End-to-End Linux Administration Support: A Comprehensive Study of Installation, Configuration, Performance Tuning, and Production Reliability Across Heterogeneous Platforms
papers.reference: Satya Nanda Vara Prasad Kanchumarthi (2026). End-to-End Linux Administration Support: A Comprehensive Study of Installation, Configuration, Performance Tuning, and Production Reliability Across Heterogeneous Platforms. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.30574/wjarr.2026.30.1.1022
papers.abstract:
Purpose: The purpose of this study is to explore end-to-end Linux administration practices, focusing on installation, configuration, performance tuning, and production reliability in heterogeneous computing environments. With the increasing complexity of distributed systems, Linux administrators must manage diverse infrastructures efficiently while ensuring system stability and scalability.
Design/methodology/approach: This research adopts a qualitative and analytical approach by reviewing existing literature, system administration frameworks, and real-world case studies. It evaluates Linux system lifecycle stages, including deployment, configuration management, performance optimization, and reliability engineering across heterogeneous platforms such as cloud, edge, and enterprise systems.

papers.title: Performance-Driven End-to-End Optimization for UAV-Assisted Satellite Downlink with Hybrid NOMA/OMA Transmission
papers.reference: Tie Liu, Chenhua Sun, et al. (2026). Performance-Driven End-to-End Optimization for UAV-Assisted Satellite Downlink with Hybrid NOMA/OMA Transmission. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.3390/electronics15020471
papers.abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV)-assisted satellite downlink transmission is a promising solution for improving coverage and throughput under challenging propagation conditions. However, the achievable performance gains are fundamentally constrained by the coupling between access transmission and the satellite–UAV backhaul, especially when decode-and-forward (DF) relaying and hybrid multiple access are employed. In this paper, we investigate the problem of end-to-end downlink sum-rate maximization in a UAV-assisted satellite network with hybrid non-orthogonal multiple access (NOMA)/orthogonal multiple access (OMA) transmission. We propose a performance-driven end-to-end optimization framework, in which UAV placement is optimized as an outer-layer control variable through an iterative procedur

papers.title: Query-MARFT: Query-Guided Multi-Agent Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking
papers.reference: Jiazheng Wen, Yuheng Su, et al. (2026). Query-MARFT: Query-Guided Multi-Agent Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for End-to-End Multi-Object Tracking. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6731126
papers.abstract: Current end-to-end multi-object tracking (MOT) methods face three primary bottlenecks: the intrinsic mismatch between local supervised signals and global trajectory metrics, rigid predefined module coordination, and the stability-plasticity dilemma caused by traditional full-parameter fine-tuning. To address these limitations, we propose Query-MARFT, a novel Query-Guided Multi-Agent Reinforcement Fine-Tuning framework. We reconceptualize the evolution of track queries as a Flexible Markov Game, decoupling the trajectory lifecycle into four role-specific agents: Detection Focus, Association Modulation, Temporal Update, and Trajectory Correction. To accommodate diverse visual dynamics, these agents collaborate dynamically via a scene-adaptive Directed Acyclic Graph topology. Furthermore, to

papers.title: ANALISA PROFIL BANDWIDTH  JARINGAN COPPER, FIBER OPTIK DAN MIGRASI SERTA LOSS LINK BUDGET DI PT TELKOM KEDIRI
papers.reference: INDRA HADI MUSTOFA (2019). ANALISA PROFIL BANDWIDTH  JARINGAN COPPER, FIBER OPTIK DAN MIGRASI SERTA LOSS LINK BUDGET DI PT TELKOM KEDIRI. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.29407/gj.v3i2.13342
papers.abstract:
Dalam hal layanan indihome 3P jaringan copper tidak mampu mengirim data internet yang maksimal </= 3 Mbps maka dari itu dimigrasikan ke jaringan fiber optik yang mengirimkan bandwidth sampai >100 Mbps. Rata-rata bandwidth jaringan copper upload 0,62 dan download 3,28 Mbps , serta jaringan fiber optik untuk upload 2,57 Mbps dan upload 11,62 Mbps, serta migrasi upload 7,01Mbps dan download 10,73 Mbps
Attenuation atau redaman jaringan copper upload 16,82 dBm dan download 33,77 dBm serta jaringan fiiber optik atau migrasi redaman upload 2,44dBm dan download -20,34 dBm. Kabel fiber optik dalam pengiriman data melalui gelombang upload 1310 nm , download 1490 nm, streaming 1550 nm dengan loss link budget  </= -28 dBm .
 
Kata Kunci : Copper, Fiber Optik, Migrasi,  Bandwidth,  Loss Link Budget.

papers.title: Investigating laser-driven pair-production with a fast, end-to-end, analytical model
papers.reference: Vasiliki  E. Alexopoulou (2026). Investigating laser-driven pair-production with a fast, end-to-end, analytical model. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.6664663
papers.abstract: Laser-driven positron sources, generated through ultra-intense laser–matter interactions, have attracted significant interest due to their relevance in fundamental physics, laboratory astrophysics, and advanced applications. However, their modeling remains challenging, as the generation of electron–positron pairs involves a complex chain of strongly coupled physical processes, including preplasma formation, relativistic electron acceleration, transport, photon emission, and pair-production. Existing approaches typically rely either on simplified analytical models or on computationally intensive numerical simulations, both of which treat individual mechanisms in isolation, limiting rapid optimization and full-process understanding. In this work, a fast, end-to-end analytical model is develo

papers.title: An End-to-End Model Traceability Framework for Process-Driven Software Development
papers.reference: Marko Mijalkovic (2025). An End-to-End Model Traceability Framework for Process-Driven Software Development. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.32920/29873819
papers.abstract:
Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) is a methodology in software development which emphasizes the use of models throughout the development process. Key aspects of MDE include process modelling and enactment, which provide a systemic approach to developing software. Traceability is currently gaining prominence within MDE, since it facilitates the tracking of artefacts through the development and management process, from inception to final output.

We propose an approach that integrates end-to-end traceability with process modelling. In our research, process models represent MDE workflows that span platform-independent modelling, platform-specific modelling, and code generation phases. Process execution is automated using megamodels and model transformation chains. The

papers.title: Profil žiaka vo vzťahu k učiteľovi Pupil’s Profile and Pupil — Teacher Relationship
papers.reference: Katarína Dudová (2019). Profil žiaka vo vzťahu k učiteľovi Pupil’s Profile and Pupil — Teacher Relationship. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.31261/pil.2019.01.10
papers.abstract: The aim of this paper is to bring a set of specific semantic features which profile both a pupil and a pupil’s perception of a teacher. This issue is manifested at several levels and in various aspects of the concept of SEEING in Slovak linguistic world view. The study seeks to examine this subject in view of the statements collected in the questionnaire survey conducted on 10—14‑year‑old high school students. Therefore, the author focuses on the adolescent pupil, his or her perception of the school environment, and the selection of perceived object properties.

papers.title: Aardvark weather: end-to-end data-driven weather forecasting
papers.reference: Richard Turner (2026). Aardvark weather: end-to-end data-driven weather forecasting. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu26-4536
papers.abstract: Weather forecasting is critical for a range of human activities including transportation, agriculture, industry, as well as the safety of the general public. Over the last two years, machine learning models have shown that they have the potential to transform the complex weather prediction pipeline, but current approaches still rely on numerical weather prediction (NWP) systems, limiting forecast speed and accuracy. In this talk, I will give some of the background on these developments. I will then introduce a machine learning model which can replace the entire operational NWP pipeline. Aardvark Weather, an end-to-end data-driven weather prediction system, ingests raw observations and outputs global gridded forecasts and local station forecasts. Further, it can be optimised end-to-end to m

Pelajar yang bernalar kritis mampu secara objektif memproses informasi baik kualitatif maupun kuantitatif, membangun keterkaitan antara berbagai informasi, menganalisis informasi, mengevaluasi dan menyimpulkannya. papers.title: Profil Profil Keterampilan Berpikir Kreatif Peserta Didik SMK
papers.reference: Devi Meiarti (2021). Profil Profil Keterampilan Berpikir Kreatif Peserta Didik SMK. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.30599/jipfri.v5i2.684
papers.abstract: The aim of this research is to analyze the initial profile of creative thinking skills in Vocational School students on physics learning. This research was a quantitative descriptive research using test method. The population used in this study were all students of class XII at SMK Islam Nurul Hadi in Demak Regency. The sample used was 30 student’s selected by random sampling. The instrument used is a open-ended test with four items each representing an indicator of creative thinking. The indicators used are indicators that had been developed by an expert. The result of students’ creative thinking skills in physic subject showed 56,67% which was categorized as sufficient. papers.title: Designing an End-to-End Urban Air Pollution Forecasting Framework: A Data-Driven Pipeline Approach
papers.reference: Musa Milli (2025). Designing an End-to-End Urban Air Pollution Forecasting Framework: A Data-Driven Pipeline Approach. Retrieved from https://doi.org/10.21203/rs.3.rs-7537438/v1
papers.abstract:
Abstract
Air pollution forecasting plays a vital role in mitigating the adverse impacts of deteriorating air quality on public health and urban sustainability. This study presents a data-driven framework for urban air quality forecasting, focusing on the accurate prediction of PM 2.5 concentrations. To ensure reliable model training, the Beijing Air Quality dataset was carefully preprocessed, including handling of missing values, removal of outliers, and feature selection based on correlation analysis. The proposed model introduces a residual-enhanced hybrid forecasting framework that integrates the statistical interpretability of Prophet with the nonlinear learning capacity of Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks. Prophet is first employed to capture long-term trend and seasonality comp

papers.abstract: Komunitas Pena Hitam Malang masih belum dikenali oleh sebagian besar masyarakat, hanya dikenal oleh para ilustrator atau seniman lokal saja. Masih banyak remaja Malang yang baru terjun dalam bidang seni yang hanya mengetahui nama Pena Hitam saja, tetapi tidak mengetahui yang sebenarnya bahwa Pena Hitam adalah sebuah komunitas ilustrasi asal Malang yang masih aktif hingga sekarang. Komunitas Pena Hitam belum mempunyai media yang berbentuk gambar bergerak atau bisa disebut dengan video profil. Dengan adanya video profil ini untuk memberikan informasi kepada remaja Malang khususnya illustrator dan juga seniman pemula yang ada di Malang dan sekitarnya untuk mengenal lebih dalam apa itu Komunitas Pena Hitam Malang.
